query_normalized: cross-dataset consistency of alpha peak frequency estimates in resting-state eeg neuroscience
rationale: This paper does not address the core question of cross-dataset consistency of alpha peak frequency estimates. While it works with resting-state EEG and alpha band analysis (related domain), it focuses on clinical classification of psychosis using PSD rather than measuring alpha peak frequency specifically or examining measurement consistency across datasets.
